outages.headline: Russian oil refining drops to 21-year low after drone strikes
outages.summary: Russian oil refining volumes have fallen to their lowest level in 21 years following damage from Ukrainian drone strikes, according to commodities data firm Kpler on Tuesday. Russian refinery crude runs have declined to approximately 3.80 million barrels per day, marking the lowest level in more than two decades. Refinery downtime and attacked capacity currently ...
